title: CURVER Style Rattan Effect Kitchen, Living room, Bathroom, Bedroom, Utility Small Rectangular Storage Basket 6 Litres - White
features: An elegant storage solution for your bathroom, kitchen, living room, office or study areas
Traditional flat rattan effect design that is stackable to store away with ease when not in use
Durable, lightweight and easy to clean with a 6 Litre capacity
External Dimensions: 28 x 19 x 13 cm (L x W x H)
Made in the UK and Europe
description: From the manufacturer Curver Style Small Rectangular Storage Basket Vintage White 6 Litre The Style small rectangular 6 litre basket is multi functional and can be used for neatly storing all of those bits and pieces such as perfumes, nail polishes or toiletries. Whether it's keeping all bathroom accessories together or being used in your office to keep stationery items tidy and easily accessible, this versatile basket is the ideal storage solution. Made from durable resin, this basket is easy to clean and will stay looking good for years. Main Features Elegant Rattan Effect Style Easy To Handle Multi Purpose Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Bedroom In your bedroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for wardrobe storage for all of your clothes, bags and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
